risk_title: Project Implementation Suspended Due to Political Instability
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) component was canceled and IDA grants remain suspended due to the extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Resilience Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Political and Governance Fragility Affecting Implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks remain rated as High, indicating ongoing instability that constrains project execution and institutional capacity for implementation.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance [Risk Category Rating]: High [Previous Rating]: High [Current Rating]: High

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints Due to Governance Fragility
risk_summary: Institutional capacity for implementation and sustainability remains rated High risk, reflecting governance fragility affecting the implementing agencies' ability to execute project activities.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability [Risk Category Rating]: High [Previous Rating]: High [Current Rating]: High

risk_summary: Both Progress towards PDO and Overall Implementation Progress are rated Unsatisfactory, with minimal disbursement (26% of IDA funds) and stalled indicator achievement, reflecting the impact of the extraordinary situation in Afghanistan.
evidence_quote: Progress towards achievement of PDO: Unsatisfactory [Current Rating]. Overall Implementation Progress (IP): Unsatisfactory [Current Rating]. Disbursed: 4.42 [out of 17.86 revised] (26% Disbursed)
